title: Shared RAN cluster exhausts available capacity
description: DTDL adapter reports sustained radio-access congestion across one bounded cluster.

telemetry.statement: CELL-101, CELL-102, and CELL-103 sustain 93% load with rising queue delay and 1.7% packet loss.

topology.statement: Three affected cells share CLUSTER-ALPHA and can shift at most 15% traffic to CLUSTER-BETA.

change_history.statement: No configuration or software deployment touched affected cells during prior 24 hours.

security.statement: Traffic origin distribution matches normal subscriber demand; no attack indicator detected.
